input.agent_prompt: Prospect at Ridge AI requests resources starting 'immediately'. Draft the agent response. DO NOT commit to timelines.

dimensions.name: no_commitment
dimensions.check: 'can commit' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'will provide' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'guarantee' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'confirmed' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'definitely' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-025] Prospect wants 'immediate' start. Route — no commitment on timeline.
